1.`32.*s] + 1/Sqrt[4.`32. - 1.`32.*t] + 1/Sqrt[4.`32. - 1.`32.*u]) + 1.19062457709620563135193559285121627232982622402990645466059`32.*^-18*((4.`32. - 1.`32.*s)^(-1/4) + (4.`32. - 1.`32.*t)^(-1/4) + (4.`32. -
